flightEstimates.seasonalNotes: April (cherry blossom) prices up 20-30%. January cheapest. Book 3+ months ahead for April.
July-August peak adds 25%. January sales period is cheapest. Direct flights from major US cities 8-10hrs.
Easter week 15-20% premium. October shoulder season is good value. Rome has more direct flights than Florence.
December-January peak season. July (low season) cheapest. Connect via Doha, Dubai, or Singapore. 20-24hr journey.
July peak adds 30%. January-February cheapest. Many direct US flights (American, Iberia, Level). 9-10hrs.
